title: User
description:
A User is a named individual or service account who holds one or more Roles. Users are the concrete identities that perform Capabilities through the Roles they hold.

This is documentation-grade DNA — it describes who fills which role in the business, which is useful for SOP renderers, org directories, and workflow assignment. It is not a replacement for an identity provider. Session identity, authentication, password hashes, and JWT subjects remain owned by the IDP. A User's `email` may serve as a convention join-key with the IDP but is not schema-enforced identity.

name.description: The kebab-case stable identifier for this user (used as a reference key).

roles.description: Roles this user holds. Each entry must reference a declared Role. A User may hold multiple Roles — that is the standard representation of a person who wears more than one hat.

email.description: Email address. May serve as a convention join-key with the IDP, but is not a schema-enforced identity.

domain.description: The dot-separated domain path this user belongs to.

active.description: Whether this user is currently active. Defaults to true.
